semantics: Stuck-set census across n=8 (15 incidence-completeness survivors), n=9 (184 pre-vertex-circle assignments) and n=10 (sample of patterns passing pair/crossing/count filters). Threshold=3 (Key Peeling).

l5_l6_audit.comment: L5/L6 says any unordered pair {a,b} of vertices appears in at most two selected rows globally. Inside a stuck set S, the outside-pair multiplicity (number of stuck centers whose 'outside witnesses' include {a,b}) is bounded by the global L5 cap = 2. We report patterns whose outside-pair multiplicity already meets the cap without any global slack.
